name: Anisette
recipeInstructions:
1. If the anise and fennel seeds are first worked in a mortar, the flavor will be slightly stronger.
2. Add the spices to the vodka and steep for one week, shaking the jar occasionally during the steeping period.
3. Strain through cheesecloth several times.
4. Add one cup of sugar syrup; stir and taste.
5. If desired, add more sugar syrup gradually, tasting after each addition and stirring as needed until you achieve the desired sweetness without all the syrup being used up.
